race.comment: All the top chances at acceptances have been scratched leaving us with a mediocre affair. GRASSMERE DIAMOND (5) first-up from an 11-month spell will be hard to beat. Consistent sprinter who excelled on wet tracks when last in work. Went well in a recent Hamilton jump-out so she looks forward enough. Should jump straight to the front and give them something to catch. ORLABENT (1) has not appeared since leading for home then dropping out over 1100m at Ballarat on 30 April. Did well in a subsequent jump-out. Good 1000m sprinter who handles this going. BIFROST (2) has been freshened up since a poor return at Warrnambool five weeks ago. Down in class and can improve sharply. SPINHOF (12) finds it hard to win but did catch the eye at the end of 1100m at Ararat at the latest outing. Suited by the small field and should prove tough to hold out. EL SALTO (10) is not racing well but can do better in this line-up.
